candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; values align with reported sales.
Appears to be a malformed/concatenated revenue row with identical values to Total Revenue; possible alternate imported label.

variables.notes: Used explicit revenue line first. Included the duplicated malformed revenue label as lower-priority fallback only.

candidates.why: Explicit total cost of revenues / cost of sales line.

candidates.row_label: Staff Costs in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Component of cost of revenues, but incomplete on its own.
Residual component of cost of revenues, but incomplete on its own.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS total rather than underlying components to avoid incomplete coverage in years where components are not fully populated in preview.

candidates.why: Clear selling/marketing overhead component above EBIT.
Clear administrative overhead component above EBIT.
Could be SG&A-related overhead, but likely already embedded in broader operating expense lines; using it risks double counting.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Subcomponent of administrative costs; lower priority than the full component row.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses inDistribution, sales, marketing costs
candidates.why: Subcomponent of selling/marketing costs; lower priority than the full component row.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A row is present. Selected the two main overhead component rows above EBIT. Excluded Operating Expenses - Total because it is a total, and excluded Share-based payments to avoid likely double counting.
No dedicated research and development row appears in the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Aggregate interest expense line that appears to equal the two granular components; lower priority than components to avoid losing granularity.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest components over the aggregate Interest expense line. Excluded supplemental lease-interest rows because they duplicate the main lease-interest line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Appears equal to parent-attributable equity and excludes NCI here; suitable fallback label.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE under the rules.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Chose owner/parent equity to exclude non-controlling interests from BE. Included Shareholders' Equity - Total as fallback because it matches the same values in the preview.

candidates.why: Explicit balance sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Alternate explicit label with identical values; suitable fallback.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred when balance sheet NCI exists.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI labels as priority list. Excluded income-statement attribution rows because MIB should come from the balance sheet when available.
